---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ev-page { --c: #F5A623; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }

        /* Hero — full-width dark with large image */
        .ev-hero { background: #000; padding: 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden; min-height: 80vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; }
        .ev-hero-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center; opacity: 0.4; }
        .ev-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; color: #fff; }
        .ev-hero-tag { display: inline-block; background: var(--c); color: #fff; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 0.3rem 1rem; border-radius: 980px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .ev-hero-content h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev-hero-content p { font-size: 1.25rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 2rem; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ev-hero-meta { font-size: 0.95rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .ev-hero-meta i { margin-right: 0.25rem; color: var(--c); }
        .ev-btn { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ev-btn:hover { background: #d9901e; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ev-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s; }
        .ev-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #fff; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }

        /* Sections */
        .ev-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ev-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ev-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ev-page h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ev-page .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ev-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ev-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ev-lk::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }

        /* Upcoming — large image cards like Apple product announcements */
        .ev-card { border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; background: #000; position: relative; transition: transform 0.3s; height: 100%; }
        .ev-card:hover { transform: scale(1.02); }
        .ev-card img { width: 100%; height: 280px; object-fit: cover; opacity: 0.65; transition: opacity 0.3s; }
        .ev-card:hover img { opacity: 0.8; }
        .ev-card-body { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 2rem; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.85)); }
        .ev-card-body h3 { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; color: #fff; }
        .ev-card-body .ev-card-meta { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ev-card-body .ev-card-meta i { color: var(--c); margin-right: 0.2rem; }
        .ev-card-body p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height: 1.45; margin-bottom: 0; }

        /* Recurring — tiles */
        .rec { text-align: center; padding: 0 1rem; }
        .rec i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .rec h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; }
        .rec p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .rec-when { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--c); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.5rem; }

        /* Past — dark image thumbnails like Apple's event archive */
        .ev-past { border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; background: #000; position: relative; transition: transform 0.3s; }
        .ev-past:hover { transform: scale(1.02); }
        .ev-past img { width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; opacity: 0.5; transition: opacity 0.3s; }
        .ev-past:hover img { opacity: 0.7; }
        .ev-past-body { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 1.5rem; color: #fff; }
        .ev-past-body h4 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
        .ev-past-body .yr { font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

        /* CTA */
        .ev-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ev-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ev-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; }
        .ev-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }

        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ev-hero { min-height: 60vh; }
          .ev-hero-content { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
          .ev-card img { height: 200px; }
          .ev-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ev-page">

<!-- HERO — full-screen dark with atmospheric image -->
<div class="ev-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image: url('/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Next Event</div>
    <h1>AI Ethics<br>Hackathon</h1>
    <div class="ev-hero-meta">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026 &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest
    </div>
    <p>A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and AI that puts people first.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="ev-btn">Register now</a>
      <a href="/academy/events/ical/ai-ethics-hackathon-2025.ics" class="ev-btn-ghost" download>Add to calendar</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING — dark image cards -->
<div class="ev-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Coming up</h2>
    <p class="sub">Spots are limited. Register early.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Summer School">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Aug 1–15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
              <p>Two weeks of cybersecurity, cloud, and AI.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="Makers Workshop">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Sep 15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</div>
              <p>Hardware, DIY, and hands-on building.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="SpaceApps Challenge">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Oct 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
              <p>NASA's 48-hour global hackathon.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING -->
<div class="ev-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Every month</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular meetups you can count on.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Open discussion, hacking, and tech exploration.</p><div class="rec-when">Last Thursday</div><a href="https://clubul.computer/" class="ev-lk">Schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry experts on emerging tech and best practices.</p><div class="rec-when">First Tuesday</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ev-lk">Next talk</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Coding sessions, open-source projects, collaborative learning.</p><div class="rec-when">See calendar</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ev-lk">Join</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST EVENTS — dark thumbnail gallery -->
<div class="ev-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past events</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-past">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Cyber Hygiene for Kids">
            <div class="ev-past-body">
              <h4>Cyber Hygiene for Kids</h4>
              <div class="yr">Craiova · November 2024</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="ev-past">
          <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Capture the Flag">
          <div class="ev-past-body">
            <h4>Capture the Flag</h4>
            <div class="yr">Craiova · November 2023</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-past">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="SpaceApps Challenge">
            <div class="ev-past-body">
              <h4>SpaceApps · 9 Editions</h4>
              <div class="yr">Sweden & Romania · 2016–2024</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="ev-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ev-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Get event updates or discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="ev-btn">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ev-lk" style="padding-top:0.85rem;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
